expectations.evidence: JSDoc contract on generateToken: `Produces a one-way SHA-256 token from the given payload, salted with random bytes to ensure uniqueness even for identical payloads. The salt is not preserved — the token cannot be reversed or verified without a separate lookup mechanism.`
`// Salt ensures identical payloads produce distinct tokens` — explains why salt is added, not just what.

All trivial comments removed: '// Import dependencies', '// Create the hash', '// Add the payload', '// Get the salt', '// Add the salt', '// Return the hex digest', '// This function generates a token'.
No `// --- Constants ---`, `// --- Types ---`, `// --- Functions ---` dividers present.
